ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the college football team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division within the conference */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team (city, state) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "champion" TEXT /* Champion team of the season */,
  "runner_up" TEXT /* Runner-up team of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_season_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's season record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in the season */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties in the season */,
  "conference_wins" INTEGER /* Number of conference wins in the season */,
  "conference_losses" INTEGER /* Number of conference losses in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_season_records_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_season_records_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offensive_statistics" (
  "offense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's offensive statistics */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored per game */,
  "offensive_yards_per_game" REAL /* Average offensive yards gained per game */,
  "passing_yards_per_game" REAL /* Average passing yards gained per game */,
  "rushing_yards_per_game" REAL /* Average rushing yards gained per game */,
  "total_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Total touchdowns scored */,
  "passing_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Passing touchdowns scored */,
  "rushing_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Rushing touchdowns scored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offensive_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offensive_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defensive_statistics" (
  "defense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's defensive statistics */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "points_allowed_per_game" REAL /* Average points allowed per game */,
  "total_yards_allowed_per_game" REAL /* Average total yards allowed per game */,
  "passing_yards_allowed_per_game" REAL /* Average passing yards allowed per game */,
  "rushing_yards_allowed_per_game" REAL /* Average rushing yards allowed per game */,
  "total_sacks" INTEGER /* Total sacks */,
  "total_interceptions" INTEGER /* Total interceptions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("defense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defensive_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defensive_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, journalist, fan) */,
  "subscription_level" TEXT /* Subscription level of the user (e.g., basic, premium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analysis) */,
  "data_exported" INTEGER /* Whether data was exported or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "predicted_score" REAL /* Predicted score for the team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction (scale: 0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the coach (e.g., head coach, assistant coach) */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the player (e.g., freshman, sophomore, junior, senior) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the game (e.g., win, loss, tie) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
